hookCapture.patchTarget: Execute-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates the host(s) (A-record(s)). Multiple can be updated for the same account by providing more hosts

options.name: --user-name
options.description: The user name of the account on whose behalf you call

options.name: --password
options.description: The password of the account on whose behalf you call

options.name: --domain
options.description: The domain you want to update
